messages.content: 翻译下面这段话：这种检测方法很容易受到食物中其他物质的干扰
This detection method is easily interfered by other substances in food.
翻译下面这段话：这种检测方法相比质谱更易受到食物中其他物质的干扰
This detection method is more susceptible to interference from other substances in food compared to mass spectrometry.
这些检测食物中AGEs的方法也可以用于检测血液中的AGEs
These methods for detecting AGEs in food can also be used to detect AGEs in blood.
There are two major sources for the accumulation of AGEs in vivo
体内AGEs积累的两个主要来源有：
润色下面这句话：There are two major sources for the accumulation of AGEs in vivo
There are two primary sources for the accumulation of AGEs in the body:
润色下面这段话 Therefore, we considered a combined  scores instead those individual biomarkers, and we found the combined scores of AGEs, CML and MGO may improve the reliability of early diagnosis of DKD.
Therefore, we opted to use combined scores instead of individual biomarkers, and our findings suggest that the combined scores of AGEs, CML, and MGO could enhance the accuracy of early DKD diagnosis.

These findings were only associations within a cross section, which limited causal inferences. Therefore, further testing in other cohorts will be important for the real predictive value of the associations found
由于这些发现只是在一个截面内进行的关联研究，因此限制了对因果推断的能力。因此，在其他队列中进行进一步的测试对于这些关联的真实预测价值非常重要。

润色下面这段话
These findings were only associations within a cross section, which limited causal inferences. Therefore, further testing in other cohorts will be important for the real predictive value of the associations found

These findings were observed as associations within a cross-sectional study design, thereby limiting the ability to establish causal relationships. Therefore, it is crucial to conduct further testing in additional cohorts to determine the true predictive value of these associations.

润色下面这段话Considering the findings of our study and those of recent reports, we suggest that the combined detection of serum AGEs, CML and MGO levels in individuals with T2D can be used to add value for risk reclassification on top of the conventionally  used biomarkers.

Based on the findings of our study as well as recent reports, we propose that the combination detection of serum AGEs, CML, and MGO levels in individuals with T2D has the potential to enhance risk reclassification beyond conventional biomarkers that are commonly used.

润色下面这段话Based on the findings of our study and those of recent reports, we propose that the combined detection of serum AGEs, CML and MGO levels in individuals with T2D has the potential to improve risk prediction along with conventional biomarkers that are commonly used.

Building upon the results of our study and recent reports, we suggest that implementing a combined detection approach for serum AGEs, CML, and MGO levels in individuals with T2D has the potential to enhance risk prediction, in conjunction with commonly utilized conventional biomarkers.
